text_original: Fun app: The only thing I don't like is that with certain stories, the ai gets mixed up with who is who in the story and the pin message feature is annoying as it only allows 50 pinned messages which is not cool if you want to keep your story going but other than that its a fun app
text_zh: 有趣的应用：唯一让我不太喜欢的是，某些故事中AI会搞混人物身份，而且钉顶消息功能很烦人，因为它只能保存50条钉顶消息，如果你想持续更新你的故事的话这点就不太好了。除此之外，它还是一个有趣的应用
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for the 5-star review and detailed feedback! We're sorry the AI got mixed up with roles—this is a known limitation we're actively improving. Regarding the Pin feature, we're aware of the 50-message cap and are exploring ways to enhance it. For specific issues, please reach out to support@fantachat.
reply_zh: 你好！感谢你的五星评价和详细反馈！对于AI在角色分配上出现的混淆，我们深表歉意，这是已知的限制，我们正在积极改进。关于Pin功能，我们了解其50条消息的限制，并正在探索增强的方法。如遇具体问题，请联系support@fantachat。
